description: Referencing the classic sport shoe, the inspiration for this stylish piece comes from the idea that hardy shoes should not only feel good but also look good. Crafted from genuine nubuck leather, this red tape shoe will only get better with age. The low-top styling, thick midsole and soft overlay make this shoe a closet essential. Wear this with tonal corduroy trousers and a polo T-shirt, or with denims and subtly hued monochrome tees. Upper Textured leather upper with stitch detail at the seams of the toe box Central lace ups Padded tongue Leather lining Padded insole for instep comfort Midsole Tough, thick rubber midsole for cushioned comfort Outsole Rubber midsole with all-over, waffle shaped lugs, impact guidance line along the length of the outsole and a suction point at the toe Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a nubuck brush to remove dust from suede parts Do not store in direct sunlight
